input.initialPrompt: Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this .NET project. They haven't run any coverage yet, so I need to:

1. Explore the project structure
2. Set up and run tests with code coverage
3. Analyze the results

Let me start by exploring the project structure.

data.content: Good — the project already includes `coverlet.collector`. Let me run tests with coverage collection.
data.reasoningText:
Now I have a good understanding of the project. Let me run the tests with code coverage using coverlet, then analyze the results.

The project already has `coverlet.collector` as a dependency. I can run:
```
dotnet test --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage"
```

Then I'll parse the coverage results to identify gaps and risk hotspots.

toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-5061630c20e54de898aa754fea6d4d6e && dotnet test --collect:\"XPlat Code Coverage\" --results-directory ./TestResults 2>&1", "description": "Run tests with code coverage", "initial_wait": 60}
